ph_signals.name: low_persistence_signal
ph_signals.description: Very low average persistence in both H0 and H1 — PH is noisy
ph_signals.reasoning: When average persistence is very low in both dimensions, most PH features are noise (short-lived). Image-based descriptors that bypass PH entirely extract more reliable signal from pixel patterns.
